name: pantheon
description: Pantheon — Petpooja's design system — as a Claude plugin. Every teammate's Claude produces Pantheon-aligned UI, docs, decks, and marketing assets out of the box, with automatic weekly re-sync from the Pantheon Figma file.

plugins.name: pantheon-design-system
plugins.description: Petpooja's Pantheon design system applied automatically to every visual or branded output. Includes on-demand /sync-pantheon Figma re-digest, a one-time /pantheon-bootstrap for new teammates, and a UserPromptSubmit hook that keeps the local reference fresh with a weekly auto-sync.
